title: HealthVerityClaims
description:
This space contains two tables related to healthcare claims data: medical_claim and pharmacy_claim. The medical_claim table includes information about medical service claims, such as claim ID, patient ID, service dates, location of care, and pay type. The pharmacy_claim table contains pharmacy-related claims, including claim ID, patient ID, service date, drug code (NDC), fill number, days supply, dispensed quantity, pay type, copay/coinsurance, and payment amounts.

This space can answer questions about medical and pharmacy claims, such as claim counts, trends over time, patient activity, pay type distributions, locations of care, drug utilization, and payment amounts. You can analyze patterns by date, patient, pay type, or drug code, and compare medical versus pharmacy claims. It supports aggregations, breakdowns, and filtering based on the available columns in both tables.
